name: Champion Building
summary: An enterprise deal technique focused on developing an internal advocate who wants the problem solved and is willing to sell for you when you are not in the room.
whenToUseIt: Use champion building in any multi-stakeholder B2B deal, especially enterprise opportunities where internal advocacy matters more than rep access alone.
steps: Identify the stakeholder who feels the pain most strongly and stands to gain from solving it.
Equip that person with proof, language, and clarity so they can advocate internally.
Strengthen the relationship by helping them win inside their own organization.
example: A Head of Platform becomes a stronger champion after the AE gives them an ROI summary, rollout framing, and competitive proof they can use with the CTO and finance.
